title: croton balsensis
intro: Croton balsensis, also known as the Balsam Croton, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, native to India and Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton balsensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Croton balsensis include extracts, oils, and infusions that can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
